ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modem_types" (
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modem type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the modem type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modem type */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of communication technology used by the modem */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the modem manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the modem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baud_rates" (
  "baud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baud rate entry */,
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modem type */,
  "bit_rate_15_8" TEXT /* Bit rate using 15:8 representation */,
  "bit_rate_7_0" TEXT /* Bit rate using 7:0 representation */,
  "gmsk_rate" TEXT /* GMSK modulation rate */,
  "ook_rate" TEXT /* OOK modulation rate */,
  "actual_br" REAL /* Actual bit rate in bps */,
  "baud_rate_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the baud rate */,
  "modulation_scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modulation scheme used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baud_rates_modulation_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("modulation_scheme_id") REFERENCES modulation_schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baud_rates_modem_id FOREIGN KEY ("modem_id") REFERENCES modem_types ("modem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modem type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for transmission */,
  "data_transfer_rate" REAL /* Data transfer rate for the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_types_modem_id FOREIGN KEY ("modem_id") REFERENCES modem_types ("modem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "baud_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baud rate */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date when the metric was logged */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the transmission */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate during transmission */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the transmission */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate during transmission */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter (delay variation) during transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_baud_id FOREIGN KEY ("baud_id") REFERENCES baud_rates ("baud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modem accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the modem data */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_modem_id FOREIGN KEY ("modem_id") REFERENCES modem_types ("modem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modulation_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modulation scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the modulation scheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modulation scheme */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the modulation scheme */,
  "scheme_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modulation scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_versions" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modem type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the firmware */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the firmware */,
  "firmware_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the firmware version */,
  "firmware_size" INTEGER /* Size of the firmware file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_versions_modem_id FOREIGN KEY ("modem_id") REFERENCES modem_types ("modem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_logs" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network log entry */,
  "modem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modem type */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_logs_modem_id FOREIGN KEY ("modem_id") REFERENCES modem_types ("modem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
